items.title: Iran abused mobile networks’ vulnerabilities to locate U.S. military in the Middle East, report says
items.summary: The Iranian government exploited well-known flaws in cellphone networks to locate and then strike U.S. military personnel in the build-up and beginning of the war.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
